CustomField.description: Summary of Email work item execution status with sent/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalEmailsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalEmailsPlanned__c = TotalEmailsProcessed__c && TotalEmailsSent__c = TotalEmailsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalEmailsSent__c) & " sent", IF(TotalEmailsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalEmailsSent__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalEmailsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalEmailsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalEmailsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalEmailsSent__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalEmailsPlanned__c) & " sent" & IF(TotalEmailsProcessed__c - TotalEmailsSent__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalEmailsProcessed__c - TotalEmailsSent__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalEmailsPlanned__c - TotalEmailsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalEmailsPlanned__c - TotalEmailsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalEmailsPlanned__c - TotalEmailsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalEmailsPlanned__c - TotalEmailsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of Email work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Email Summary
